rule_metadata.name: SUSP_LNK_Big_Link_File
rule_metadata.description: Detects a suspiciously big LNK file - maybe with embedded content
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_LNK_Big_Link_File
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a suspiciously big LNK file - maybe with embedded content"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2018-05-15"
		score = 65
		id = "e130f213-53fc-56d6-b1d5-0508a7e18e61"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x004c and uint32( 4 ) == 0x00021401 and filesize > 200KB
}
